summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Hamburg Apartment Scanner. 11/11 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend renders, countdown works, filters work, view toggle works, apartment cards display all required fields with correct immomio URLs. App is functioning end-to-end with mock data.

minor.issue: last_scan and next_scan are returned as null until first scan completes via scheduler; next_scan is never actually updated to a future time after scans (only set at startup).
Uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); should migrate to lifespan handlers in FastAPI.

issues: Countdown timer in StatusBar is purely client-side (resets to 3:00 every 180s) and not synchronized with backend next_scan timestamp - drift can occur between actual scheduler scans and UI countdown.

action_items: (Optional) Sync StatusBar countdown with backend next_scan to avoid timer drift.
(Optional) Populate scanning_state['next_scan'] after each completed scan (currently only set once at startup).
(Optional) Migrate from deprecated on_event to FastAPI lifespan.
RESEND_API_KEY is empty — email notifications won't be sent (acceptable for current scope; app correctly no-ops when key absent).
critical_code_review_comments: scrape_immomio_hamburg() is mocked (acknowledged in code comments). Generates random UUIDs per scan — listings never repeat, so 'seen' flow is never naturally exercised in scheduler (every scan adds brand new apartments).
Backend correctly excludes mongo _id via projection.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
seed_data_creation: Scan-now endpoint generated mock apartments during testing (~50+ entries).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_hamburg_scanner.py covers root, scan-now, scan-status, apartments list+filters (price/rooms/status), history, settings, mark-seen flow. Frontend tested via Playwright: countdown ticks (3:00->2:57), filters reduce results correctly, NEUE/HISTORIE toggle works, ZUR ANZEIGE links use https://tenant.immomio.com/de/apply/{uuid} format, email maximnikityk@ukr.net displayed.
